Chemical Peel (PEEL)
Location: Face

Method: Salicylic acid
Chemical: Skin Medica Illuminize Peel
Area treated: Face
Discussed diagnosis, alternative treatment, risks and benefits of each treatment. Side effects discussed included but is not limited to erythema, edema, infection, delayed healing, pain, burning sensation, pigment problems, blisters, scarring, keloids, allergic reactions, recurrence of problems and worsening and/or no treatment effects of current skin condition. A written consent was obtained from the patient after explanation. Area to be treated was prepared using RD Revitalizing Cleanser and Step 1: Prepping Solution. Using a gauze applicator, a layer of Step 2: Illuminize Peeling Solution (salicylic acid + mandelic acid) was applied equally on treatment area. Patient instructed to rinse with a gentle cleanser in 6-8 hours. RD Rapid Recovery Cream + RD Pro-Tect Hydrating SPF 40 was applied after procedure. The patient tolerated the procedure well

Diamond Glow
A written consent taken from the patient after explanation. Area to be treated was prepared using RD Revitalizing Cleanser and RD Skin Balancing Toner. Treatment performed using DiamondGlow machine with HA5 Pro-Infusion Serum to neck and face. 
A total of two passes were performed. 
After treatment, Skin Medica Calming Masque applied for 10 minutes. CeraVe Moisturizing Lotion used with hand and arm massage. Masque removed with a steamed towel. RD Needle-Free Serum RD Rapid Recovery Cream used with facial massage. After facial massage, RD Pro-Tect Hydrating SPF 40 was applied. Patient tolerated the treatment well.

procedure:
Chemical: Illuminize Peel 
Area treated: Face
Duration: 50 minutes
Chemical Peel (PEEL)
Location: Face
Discussed diagnosis, alternative treatment, risks and benefits of each treatment. Side effects discussed included but is not limited to erythema, edema, infection, delayed healing, pain, burning sensation, pigment problems, blisters, scarring, keloids, allergic reactions, recurrence of problems and worsening and/or no treatment effects of current skin condition.
A written consent was obtained from the patient after explanation. 
Area to be treated was prepared using a gentle cleanser followed by step 1 prepping solution. Using a gauze applicator, a layer of Illuminize Peel was applied equally on the treated area. 
A total of three passes were applied without a problem with a wait time of 3-4 minutes between each pass. 
A generous amount of Skin Medica Ceramide Cream and SPF 35 was applied. 
Patient education for sun protection and Post Chemical Peel Care Instructions were given to patient. Patient was advised to stay out of the sun during the during the healing process. Patient was informed to call the office or the after hours number for any concerns that she may develop with regards to the treatment.
